expansion_integrations.description: Per-WIN post_hoc audit: 62 WINs received standardized post-hoc rebuttal sentences appended to detail_verdict_text. Categories: T=18 (textbook), D=31 (field-specific dataset), V=10 (dome-derived), O=3 (obscure, flagged for verdict review). 6 WINs skipped (already addressed: 014, 025, 037, 058b, 061, 065). ISS-697 was already closed by previous run. ISS-677 remains open (prospective wins pipeline, different scope). Obscure WINs 003, 011, 015 pushed to curmudgeon priority queue for verdict review.

pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — 5th consecutive quiet poll. V51.1 stable, 69 WINs, 94.5% accuracy. ai-context page still 404 (pre-existing).
pipeline_status.analyst: EXP-050 (CAT-005 proposal package) and EXP-054 (post-hoc audit) were the two ready-to-integrate expansions this run. EXP-050 was already properly routed to curmudgeon in previous run. EXP-054 integrated this run (62 patches).
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 7 items in priority queue (mode: bau). Queue: EXP-050 proposal, Section 3.1b (EXP-053), Section 2b.7 (EXP-055), WIN-003/011/015 obscure verdict review, EXP-054 batch sanity-check. Normal 4h cadence continues.

external_reports.report_1: Already tracked as ISS-698 (wontfix). Positive feedback only ('You're awesome'). No action required.

expansion_status.EXP-050: Already routed to curmudgeon in previous run (queue_id=1). Not re-routed. ISS-696 correctly blocked-on-curmudgeon.
expansion_status.EXP-054: Integrated this run. 62 patches applied, 0 failed. All 2244 tests pass.

integrity_status.note: EXP-052 ID gap in expansion tracker — intentional (renumbered to EXP-054 to avoid collision; see EXP-054 tracker entry). No action needed. Test suite: 2244 passed, 0 failed.

social_status.drafts: rebrand-resistance-strategy.md pending human review. ISS-699 open for keywords meta tag. No social content changes this run.

recommended_actions.action: Human: Approve/reject ISS-442 verdict taxonomy restructuring (editorial decision needed)
Human: Investigate ISS-675 (GitHub PAT on FUSE mount). Security issue.
Human: Approve rebrand-resistance keywords ISS-699 (meta tag expansion for dome cosmology terms)
Curmudgeon: Review EXP-050 proposal package (CAT-005 refraction cascade) — in queue_id=1
Curmudgeon: Review 3 obscure WINs (003, 011, 015) for verdict legitimacy under carve-out. May warrant post_hoc=false retagging.
